title: The Weird Science of Oobleck
script_summary: Dash uncovers the surprising properties of oobleck, a magical mixture of cornstarch and water.

segments.voiceover: This goo is liquid and solid at the same time — and you can punch it!
Meet oobleck, a non-Newtonian fluid made of just cornstarch and water.
When poured, it flows like a liquid... but strike it hard, and it becomes solid!
segments.retention_device: showing visuals of pouring and punching

segments.voiceover: This shear thickening effect makes oobleck fascinating and fun!
Check this out: the harder you hit, the firmer it gets! Perfect for some science comedy.
Ready to try oobleck yourself? Hit that follow for more wild science!

full_voiceover: This goo is liquid and solid at the same time — and you can punch it! Meet oobleck, a non-Newtonian fluid made of just cornstarch and water. When poured, it flows like a liquid... but strike it hard, and it becomes solid! This shear thickening effect makes oobleck fascinating and fun! Check this out: the harder you hit, the firmer it gets! Perfect for some science comedy. Ready to try oobleck yourself? Hit that follow for more wild science!
